description_long: This is a dark brown, rectangular shelving unit constructed from what appears to be wood or a wood-like material. The front face features four evenly spaced open shelves, providing ample storage or display space. The sides and back are solid panels, giving the structure a sturdy and enclosed appearance. The surface texture is subtly grained, suggesting a matte or semi-matte wood finish. There are no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The open shelves make it suitable for storing books, tools, or other items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces.
description: A dark brown, rectangular wooden shelving unit with four open shelves and a minimalist, solid-sided design.
description_view_0: Side view showing a solid, flat panel with no openings or features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying four open shelves and the main storage area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to the first side, with a solid, featureless panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid back panel with no openings or features.
